title: HardPlayers
body:
### Discontinued

However check my other Modrinth mods!

### ClownPierce behaviour

You have 2 spawn eggs: Diamond and netherite \
They will attack you no matter what and do approx 7 hearts of damage no armor. They do often stop in between combos but are easy to beat. They are extremely weak when you build a tower and put lava. The netherite version has a totem. Also the netherite has special abilities

Add something: patreon.com/tutla
Support me: paypal.me/tutlamc
